name: Tanner (2007)-based defined acetogen medium (with fructose for pre-culture; H2/CO2 as C/energy source in bioreactor) (PMC5816570)
description: Tanner (2007)-based defined acetogen medium (with fructose for pre-culture; H2/CO2 as C/energy source in bioreactor) — medium reported in PMC5816570 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC5816570 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.

unmapped.name: fructose (carbon/energy source, added post-autoclave; used in pre-culture)
